mapping.a_element: three-wave-interaction kinetic equations for the spectral densities
mapping.b_element: Smoluchowski aggregation equation for the mass distribution

mapping.a_element: constant flux of energy through scales (the turbulent cascade)
mapping.b_element: constant flux of mass from small masses to large masses

mapping.a_element: Kolmogorov-type power-law energy spectrum solving the kinetic equations
exactly computed constants of the spectra (Kolmogorov constant)
implicit Zakharov conformal transformation used to obtain the constant-flux spectrum
mapping.b_element: method of Zakharov transformations applied to the aggregation kernel

brief_justification: Both papers find stationary constant-flux (Kolmogorov-type) power-law solutions of a collision/kinetic integral equation via the Zakharov transformation and compute the resulting Kolmogorov constant exactly; paper A's energy cascade through the MHD three-wave kinetic equations plays exactly the role of paper B's mass flux through the Smoluchowski aggregation equation, so the underlying Kolmogorov-Zakharov machinery is the same.
